CE1.justification: Asked three clarifying questions bundled into one run-on sentence (confirm legal cleared, point at the draft, what's been said to the vendor) before further action.

CE2.justification: One single 90-word sentence chains four blockers plus three questions — dense, not terse; the user has to parse a run-on to extract the asks.

CE3.justification: Routing is only visible in the actions list; the user-facing reply doesn't say where the daybook/followups writes landed or why.

CE4.justification: Two clean writes (today's daybook, followups update); nothing reconstructed in tmp/, no orphaned drafts.
